projectDescription: An end-to-end video dubbing pipeline that downloads, transcribes, translates, voice-clones, and produces fully dubbed audio or video in a single command.
keyFeatures: 10-stage dubbing pipeline (download, transcribe, thumbnail, describe, review, translate, re-segment, TTS, assemble, subtitle)
Auto-clone speaker voice from source audio with no configuration needed
16 pre-defined voice themes (narrator, warm, deep, news, storyteller, kid, teen — male/female)
Three TTS engines: Qwen3-TTS (CUDA), Chatterbox (CUDA), and MLX (Apple Silicon)
Multiple transcription backends: OpenAI Whisper API, faster-whisper, WhisperX, and MLX Whisper
Duration-aware translation with word budgets to keep dubbed speech in sync
Automatic resume — completed stages and individual TTS segments are cached and skipped
Burn styled subtitles with Google Fonts, RTL support, and custom colors
Support for custom OpenAI-compatible LLM providers including local Ollama models
Single CLI command for the full pipeline or run individual stages independently
publicApiSurface: mazinger dub — CLI: full dubbing pipeline
mazinger translate — CLI: translate SRT subtitles
mazinger speak — CLI: TTS synthesis from SRT
mazinger subtitle — CLI: burn subtitles into video
mazinger download — CLI: download and extract audio
mazinger slice — CLI: extract time range from video
mazinger describe — CLI: LLM content analysis
mazinger resegment — CLI: re-segment subtitle timing
mazinger thumbnails — CLI: extract key frames
mazinger profile list / profile generate — CLI: manage voice profiles
